rag_rules: Use `assume` and `guarantee` keywords to express requirements.
Place assumptions and guarantees within an `annex agree { ... };` block.
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers (inputs, outputs) in AGREE expressions.
Component type contracts should focus on interface-level properties.
Ensure AGREE types (int, real, bool) are correctly declared.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` to define named boolean expressions.
Use `const` to define named constant values.
anti_patterns: Do not include AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions.
Avoid using implementation-specific details in component type contracts.
